title: jvitoralb Portfolio
welcomeSecHeader: Hello!I'm a Full Stack Software Developer
work1CardDescription: A Full Stack MERN application built with TypeScript and Reactjs. The backend was built following the REST and Microservices architectural styles.
work2CardDescription: Uma REST API desenvolvida para  simular operações de uma biblioteca, como registrar livros, usuários e emitir empréstimo de livros aos usuários registrados, construída em Java.
work3CardDescription: An end-to-end application built with JavaScript to apply Test Driven Development using Chaijs, Nodejs, Express, and MongoDB.
